1: But a scorner heareth not rebuke.
2: But the soul of the transgressors shall eat shall eat violence.
3: But But he that openeth wide his lips shall have destruction.
4: But the soul of the diligent shall be made fat.
5: But a wicked man man is loathsome, and cometh to shame.
7: There is There is that maketh himself poor, yet hath hath great riches.
8: But the poor heareth not rebuke.
9: But the lamp of the wicked shall be put out.
10: But with the well advised is is wisdom.
11: But he that gathereth by labour shall increase.
12: But when when the desire cometh, it is it is a tree of life.
13: But he that feareth the commandment shall be rewarded.
14: To depart from the snares of death.
15: But the way of transgressors is is hard.
16: But a fool layeth open his his folly.
17: But a faithful ambassador is is health.
18: But he that regardeth reproof shall be honoured.
19: But it is it is abomination to fools to depart from evil.
20: But a companion of fools shall be destroyed.
21: But to the righteous good shall be repaid.
22: And the wealth of the sinner is is laid up for the just.
23: But there is that is that is destroyed for want of judgment.
24: But he that loveth him chasteneth him betimes.
25: But the belly of the wicked shall want.
